task_completion.description: Verify Page 1 contains the correct title, subtitle, and a brain shape.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a page (or thumbnail in the page browser) containing the title 'Growth Mindset', the subtitle 'What happens when we believe we can grow?', and a circle or oval shape representing a brain.

task_completion.description: Verify Page 2 contains a T-chart comparing Fixed and Growth Mindsets.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a page (or thumbnail) with the title 'Fixed Mindset vs Growth Mindset', a vertical line creating a T-chart, and contrasting phrases (e.g., 'I can't do this' vs 'I can't do this yet', 'This is too hard' vs 'This is a challenge I can tackle', 'I give up' vs 'I'll try a different strategy').

task_completion.description: Verify Page 3 contains 'The Power of Yet' transformations with arrows.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a page (or thumbnail) with the title 'The Power of Yet', at least three pairs of text showing a transformation (e.g., adding 'yet' to the end of a negative statement), and arrow shapes connecting the pairs.

task_completion.description: Verify Page 4 contains the goal prompt and a star shape.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a page (or thumbnail) with the title 'My Growth Mindset Goal', a star shape, and the text prompt 'I will keep trying when things get hard because...'.

task_completion.description: Verify the flipchart is saved with the correct filename.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Check the title bar of the ActivInspire application window or a save dialog to confirm the file is named 'growth_mindset_lesson.flipchart' or 'growth_mindset_lesson'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the ActivInspire application to create the flipchart.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show the ActivInspire GUI with its toolbars, page browser, and canvas, rather than a text editor or terminal.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use terminal commands to bypass GUI interaction.
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal should not show commands like python scripts or echo commands attempting to directly write the .flipchart file.

integrity.description: Verify the content was placed manually on the canvas.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text and shapes should appear manually positioned on the canvas, with typical layout variations expected from human-like GUI interaction.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating a 4-page ActivInspire flipchart saved as 'growth_mindset_lesson.flipchart'. Page 1 must have the title 'Growth Mindset', subtitle 'What happens when we believe we can grow?', and a circle/oval shape. Page 2 must have the title 'Fixed Mindset vs Growth Mindset', a vertical line for a T-chart, and contrasting phrases (e.g., 'I can't do this' vs 'I can't do this yet', 'This is too hard' vs 'This is a challenge I can tackle', 'I give up' vs 'I'll try a different strategy'). Page 3 must have the title 'The Power of Yet', at least three text transformations, and at least 3 arrow shapes connecting them. Page 4 must have the title 'My Growth Mindset Goal', a star shape, and the prompt 'I will keep trying when things get hard because...'.
